title: Taterzen NPCs
description: A Citizens like NPC mod attempt.
body:
# Taterzens ![image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/samolego/Taterzens/master/docs/assets/img/banner.svg) *A server-side Citizens like NPC mod.*
It allows you to create custom **NPCs** that can have custom commands, walk around, talk (and more is to come).
For documentation, see [docs](https://samolego.github.io/Taterzens/). ![image](https://github.com/samolego/Taterzens/blob/master/docs/assets/img/main_background.png?raw=true) ## Addons * Traders https://modrinth.com/mod/tradernpcs
